message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): 'dma_set_max_seg_size' sets signal field 'device_dma_parameters.max_segment_size', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=device_dma_parameters;field=max_segment_size;offset=0] [oracle:assert=device_dma_parameters.max_segment_size stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets max_segment_size without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
